creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 244791
libwraster.diff

Window Maker 0.96.0 was released on August 5th 2023, see attached patches for both ports.

Note that in the `x11-wm/libwraster/files/patch-wrlib__wraster.h` I've only changed the header so the patch applies, but didn't rename the patch itself to reduce the diff noise.  Feel free to rename it as part of the commit.
